series_metadata.series_title: Application for Certf of Plumbing Approval
series_metadata.series_description: Application file consist of Plumbing plans, specifications, correspondence and associated documents.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain plumbing application forms, plans and correspondence for one (1) year after final expiration, including renewal, or one (1) year after denial, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
